goal: Disclose AI, get consent, qualify (purpose/budget/config/timeline), book a site visit, handle opt-out.
notes: This is the versioned source of truth for the conversation. The browser demo in web/assets/app.js mirrors it (English) for an offline preview. In production the caller-agent (WP-3) loads this flow as data and the LLM handles free-form turns; opt-out is enforced by the compliance-agent (WP-5), fail-closed.

steps.say: Namaste! This is Anaga, an AI voice assistant from Modcon Builders, calling about our Agartha project. Just so you know, I'm an AI voice agent. Do you have a quick minute to talk?
Are you looking for a home to live in, or more as an investment?
What budget range are you considering — for example one to two crore, or higher?
Are you looking at a 2BHK, 3BHK, or something larger?
Are you planning to buy in the next few months, or just exploring for now?
Based on what you've told me, I think Agartha would suit you. Could I book you a site visit this weekend?
Would Saturday or Sunday work better for you?
Done! I've booked your site visit for {day}. You'll get a WhatsApp confirmation with the location, and our sales manager will meet you there. Thank you for your time!
No problem — I'll have our sales manager send the project details on WhatsApp, and we can arrange a visit whenever you're ready. Thank you!
No worries — I'll try you another time. Thank you, and have a good day!
I completely understand. I'm adding your number to our do-not-call list now, so you won't receive further calls. Apologies for the disturbance.
